summary: Separate visual semantics, visual narrative, syntax, feature contracts, somatic routing, no-text survival, wrong-reading locks, and harness anti-drift; VAE consumes upstream meaning and must not infer it.
Require Activative Intelligence Pack, Identity DNA, Context Premise, Resonance, Matrix of Edging, and source-evidence lineage.
Interview-derived demands and selected assets preserve Reaction Receipt and Expression Moment references; applicability must be authoritative and not inferred.
Require edge pressure, activation directions, viewer roles, stance, identity urges, intended reaction, participation design, and smallest useful commitment.
Require Visual Semantic Pack and Semiotic MCDA receipt; materializer may not infer recognition carrier from free-form intent.
Require pattern match, pattern interrupt, attention-state sequence, viewer-role progression, prediction gap, payoff, affinity field, and anticipation residue; VAE may not invent them.
Require explicit contracts for meaning-changing gaze, hands, posture, witness, object punctum, negative space, contact, distance, crop, motion, light, and sequence.
Require T/V somatic route request after carrier and narrative selection; route cannot choose meaning.
Require non-empty locks for semantic production routes; deterministic resize or encoding may inherit only by reference to the accepted master.
Independent asset evaluation compares against Activation Contract, Visual Semantic Pack, Visual Narrative Program, Feature Contracts, somatic route, and locks.

Composition evaluation adds zero-second hook, pattern match and interrupt, viewer-role progression, prediction gap, payoff, affinity, anticipation residue, anti-cliche strength, and no-text survival when applicable.
Role, wrong-reading, feature-contract, visual-narrative, no-text, and composition failures are hard gates that technical or aesthetic scores cannot hide.
All five amendment acceptance tests, canonical Delegation RC1 integration, versioned evaluation profiles, and constitutional negative fixtures must pass before Stage 5.
